gigapan.description:
Another shot using the 12 foot tripod.  We noticed that the Gigapan was swaying a bit in the wind.  Spencer was concerned, since 'there were times when I could lean back at burning man, and the wind would keep me up.'  

This was stitched with an experimental stitcher version.
